Luxury Retail

HOB Department Store

2022
Client HOB
Region YAS Mall ,UAE
Year 2022
Sector Luxury Retail

Department Store – Retail Architecture & Multi-Brand Concept

The First Emirati Luxury Department Store Reimagined

HOB marked the UAE’s first Emirati luxury department store, and this Yas Mall flagship was a pivotal moment in elevating its identity. The store was envisioned as a premium multi-brand destination — housing perfumes, fashion, accessories, jewelry, and private event spaces — designed to reflect global luxury standards while remaining rooted in regional identity.
